name: aurora-checkbox
title: Aurora Checkbox & Radio
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-styled native checkbox with mixed-state support, focus glow, and label-friendly semantics.
docs:
Aurora UI component that installs Aurora Checkbox.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-input` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/checkbox.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-input`.
